title: fontanesia philliraeoides subsp. fortunei
intro: Fontanesia philliraeoides subsp. fortunei is a plant species that belongs to the family Cornaceae. It is also known as Fortune's cornelian cherry or Chinese cornelian cherry. The medicinal properties of Fontanesia philliraeoides subsp. fortunei include its ability to treat fever, cough, and respiratory issues due to its antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties. The plant is used in traditional Chinese medicine to treat various health conditions, and its herbal preparations include decoctions, infusions, and infusions used to relieve cough, fever, and respiratory issues, while also providing antioxidant and anti-inflammatory benefits.
